summary: Iteration 40 - Field Agent Mobile Portal Restructuring. Backend APIs: 20/20 tests passed (100%). All three APIs verified: GET /api/field-agent/dashboard returns agent_info, performance, statistics, risk_distribution, recent_activities, achievements. GET /api/field-agent/my-farmers returns farmers with completion data (completed/total/percentage) and forms_status (ici, ssrte, parcels, photos, register). GET /api/agent/search?phone works correctly. Mobile code structure validated - all files syntactically correct with proper navigation to FarmerProfile screen.

FieldAgentDashboard.js.tabs: PASS - 3 tabs defined: dashboard, farmers (Agriculteurs), search (Recherche)
FieldAgentDashboard.js.CTA_to_select_farmer: PASS - ctaCard component in dashboard tab with 'Selectionnez un agriculteur' text
FieldAgentDashboard.js.tab_bar_ui: PASS - TabBar with icons: grid-outline, people-outline, search-outline

FarmerProfileScreen.js.progress_section: PASS - percentCircle shows completion.percentage, progressBarFill with color coding
FarmerProfileScreen.js.mini_form_status_dots: PASS - formStatusRow maps FORMS array showing completion status for each form
FarmerProfileScreen.js.validation_banner: PASS - Shows 'Toutes les fiches sont completes !' when isComplete (percentage === 100)
FarmerProfileScreen.js.step_numbers: PASS - stepNumber component shows 1-5 for each form, checkmark when completed
FarmerProfileScreen.js.forms_list: PASS - 5 forms: ICI, SSRTE, Parcelles, Photos, Enregistrement with correct screen navigation

FarmerSearchScreen.js.navigation_to_FarmerProfile: PASS - navigateToAction function navigates to 'FarmerProfile' not 'CoopMemberDetail'
FarmerSearchScreen.js.no_CoopMemberDetail_reference: PASS - 0 references to CoopMemberDetail in file
FarmerSearchScreen.js.farmer_centric_workflow: PASS - Comment states 'Workflow farmer-centric: toujours ouvrir le profil avec ses fiches'

critical_code_review_comments: Mobile code correctly implements farmer-centric workflow: Agent selects farmer first, then accesses all forms from FarmerProfile
API response structure matches what mobile screens expect - completion object has completed/total/percentage, forms_status has ici/ssrte/parcels/photos/register keys
Navigation properly registered in AppContent.js - FarmerProfile screen accessible from both FieldAgentDashboard and FarmerSearchScreen
FarmerSearchScreen no longer references CoopMemberDetail - all navigation goes to FarmerProfile
Progress visualization implemented with percentage circle, progress bar, and mini status dots matching web version design
seed_data_creation: None - used existing field agent Kone Alphone with 2 assigned farmers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 40 tested field agent mobile portal restructuring. Backend APIs working correctly: /api/field-agent/dashboard returns full dashboard data, /api/field-agent/my-farmers returns farmers with completion tracking and forms_status, /api/agent/search finds farmers by phone. Mobile code structure validated: FieldAgentDashboard has 3 tabs (dashboard/farmers/search), FarmerProfileScreen has progress section with percentage circle and validation banner, FarmerSearchScreen navigates to FarmerProfile (not CoopMemberDetail). Field agent Kone Alphone has 2 assigned farmers. Web version at /agent/terrain confirmed same 3-tab structure.
mocked_api_note: Orange Money, Orange SMS, USSD Gateway, Email Service are MOCKED

GET /api/field-agent/dashboard.agent_info: PASS - returns id, name, zone, cooperative, cooperative_id, activation_date
GET /api/field-agent/dashboard.statistics: PASS - returns ssrte_visits, members_onboarded, parcels_declared, geotagged_photos, qr_scans, children_identified
GET /api/field-agent/dashboard.risk_distribution: PASS - returns critique, eleve, modere, faible counts
GET /api/field-agent/dashboard.recent_activities: PASS - array of visit activities with farmer_name, risk_level, children_count, date

GET /api/field-agent/my-farmers.completion_object: PASS - each farmer has completion.completed, completion.total, completion.percentage
GET /api/field-agent/my-farmers.forms_status: PASS - each farmer has forms_status with ici, ssrte, parcels, photos, register keys

GET /api/agent/search?phone.farmer_data_when_found: PASS - returns farmer object with id, full_name, phone_number, village, cooperative_name, etc.
